chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2420 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi 05.03.2018. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari, State Counsel. Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G. for the State. None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. It is now 12:10 p.m. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
